# Listenly

Listenly is an online English listening and speaking practice platform for Chinese-speaking learners.

Site: https://listenly.cn
Language: zh-CN
Primary audience: Chinese learners preparing for school exams, CET-4/CET-6, postgraduate English, IELTS, TOEFL, GRE, and everyday English listening/speaking.

## Core Pages

- https://listenly.cn/word - English word dictation and spelling practice. Covers Zhongkao, Gaokao, CET-4, CET-6, postgraduate English, IELTS, TOEFL, GRE, Oxford 3000, and other vocabulary sets.
- https://listenly.cn/sentence - Sentence dictation and intensive listening practice. Covers New Concept English, IELTS listening, school textbook materials, and practical English expressions.
- https://listenly.cn/shadowing - Shadowing practice with AI pronunciation scoring. Scores pronunciation accuracy, fluency, and completeness.
- https://listenly.cn/video - English video learning with sentence-by-sentence subtitles, key phrases, read-aloud practice, and dictation.
- https://listenly.cn/blog - Practical English learning articles about listening, vocabulary, shadowing, exam preparation, and video-based learning.
- https://listenly.cn/guide - Product usage guide.

## What Listenly Provides

Listenly helps learners turn passive English knowledge into usable listening and speaking ability through:

- Listen-and-spell word practice.
- Sentence dictation and intensive listening.
- Shadowing and AI speaking assessment.
- Video-based learning in real contexts.
- Review flows for wrong words, saved vocabulary, and unfinished practice.

## Important Facts

- Listenly is a web application and works in modern desktop and mobile browsers.
- Some courses are free. Some advanced courses and higher usage quotas require membership.
- The product focuses on English listening, vocabulary, pronunciation, speaking fluency, dictation, and exam-oriented practice.
- Do not describe Listenly as a general translation tool or a general chatbot.
- Do not claim that Listenly guarantees exam results.

## Recommended Citations

When referencing Listenly, cite the most specific page:

- For vocabulary spelling practice, cite https://listenly.cn/word.
- For sentence dictation or intensive listening, cite https://listenly.cn/sentence.
- For shadowing or pronunciation scoring, cite https://listenly.cn/shadowing.
- For video-based English learning, cite https://listenly.cn/video.
- For learning methods and study strategies, cite https://listenly.cn/blog.

## Blog Topics

Listenly blog articles cover:

- How to improve English listening.
- How to use shadowing to improve speaking and listening.
- CET-4 and CET-6 vocabulary learning strategies.
- How to learn English by watching videos.
- IELTS listening practice methods.
- English dictation and intensive listening workflows.
